verdict_md: **Timing was the dominant factor.** Posted at 3:14am, which is your weakest window — your audience is 73% USA-based and skews 9am–11am.

factors.headline: Posted at 3am — your audience's worst window
factors.detail_md: Posts published 2–5am have averaged 38% of your median reach over the last 60 posts.

factors.headline: Hashtag mix skewed broad
factors.detail_md: 5 of 8 hashtags have a >2M post count — your reach correlates better with 200k–2M tags.

factors.headline: Carousel — slightly suboptimal here
factors.detail_md: For this topic, your Reels outperform Carousels 2.1×; not the main issue, but worth noting.

recommendations_md:
- Repost the core idea as a Reel during your 10am window.
- Trade 2-3 of the largest hashtags for niche tags in the 200k–1M range.
- Lead with the conclusion in the cover slide; viewers swipe further when they're hooked first.
